name: Mock Jutsu — Synthetic Test Data Functions
description: Generate format-valid synthetic test data inside JMeter — 390 types, 6 locales, zero dependencies. Identity (TCKN, SSN, IBAN, passport), financial (card numbers, SWIFT, crypto), security, health, AI vector, telecom, aviation and more. Pipe-separated options: ${__mockjutsu_financial(cardnum:visa|TR|mask)}

1.0.0.changes: Initial release — 390 types, 9 function categories, pipe separator syntax, mask support (PCI DSS / GDPR / KVKK), 5955 tests passed
